# Writing Profile: email-professional

## Purpose and Use Cases

Use for concise professional email.

## Style Traits

Direct, warm, and lightly contextual.

## Structure and Formatting

Short opening, clear ask, brief close.

## Do / Do Not Rules

Do keep asks explicit. Do not add unprovided facts.

## Privacy and Content Boundaries

This profile describes how to write, not what to write.

## Calibration Summary

Two approved rounds.

## Invocation Examples

Use profile `email-professional` to rewrite this draft.
